Space layout: 4 perimeter offices + central core (corridor + restroom + server closet)
Description: A small office building located in Shenzhen, China. The building footprint is approximately 17.3 m (east-west) by 17.3 m (north-south), rectangular, with the long axis rotated 135 degrees from north. Total gross floor area is about 450.0 m^2 spread over 1 floor(s), giving roughly 300.0 m^2 per floor. Floor-to-floor height is 3.4 m. The building is divided into 8 thermal zones in total (about 5 per floor). Typical space layout: 4 perimeter offices + central core (corridor + restroom + server closet). Window-to-wall ratio is approximately 30% on exterior walls, with windows distributed on all four facades. Model all zones with appropriate constructions, glazing, occupancy, lighting, equipment and HVAC (ideal loads) so the IDF runs in EnergyPlus without errors.
